privileged_info_summary: The task tests Docker Compose configuration for container-to-host networking. A legacy HTTP backend service runs on the host machine on port 4567. A containerized frontend Flask application (port 8080) has the backend hostname 'backend.legacy.internal' hardcoded in its source code (cannot be modified). The task requires configuring docker-compose.yml with extra_hosts to map this hostname to the host gateway IP. The legacy service returns JSON responses with the exact string 'Legacy Core Online' in the data field, which serves as proof of successful connectivity. All values (ports 4567 and 8080, project directory /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/migration-task, hostname backend.legacy.internal, and expected response fragment) are consistent across setup, verification, and evaluation scripts.
